form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 5th over 435m at this track beaten 10 lengths (25.09) behind Somerton Mick in a Grade 5 on March 29. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when third (23.01) over 400m at Warragul. Aided by a low draw and is worth plenty of thought.
